page: Microsoft Azure E64pds_v6 is an Epdsv6-family virtual machine powered by an ARM-based Microsoft Neoverse-N2 processor. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this server features 64 dedicated physical cores and 64 vCPUs running at 3.4 GHz, with no hyperthreading. The hardware configuration includes 512.0 GB of RAM, providing a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It is equipped with 3780 GB of local NVMe SSD storage and is Premium Storage capable, though it does not include any GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

In benchmark evaluations, the E64pds_v6 demonstrates top-tier multi-core performance, scoring in the top 10% for stress-ng multi-core CPU tests, Geekbench multi-core, and Passmark CPU physics tests. Its memory subsystem is highly efficient, achieving top-tier status in uncached large-block read and write memory bandwidth. Database operations and multi-threaded decompression tasks also rank in the top 10%, while Redis SET operations and single-threaded gzip compression register strong performance in the top 25%. Single-core performance metrics, such as stress-ng single-core and Geekbench single-core, remain in the average tier.

The server offers high resource density and qualitative cost efficiency for memory-intensive and storage-heavy workloads due to its ARM64 architecture and substantial local storage capacity. The lack of AVX or AMX instruction sets represents a tradeoff for certain vector-heavy workloads, but the system compensates with strong cryptography performance via hardware AES support. This profile makes the E64pds_v6 highly suitable for large-scale database operations, memory-cached applications, software compilation, static web serving, and medium-to-large LLM text generation tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure E64pds_v6 is an ARM64-based virtual machine from the Epdsv6 family, configured with 64 dedicated physical cores on a Microsoft Neoverse-N2 processor running at 3.4 GHz. It features 512.0 GB of RAM, establishing a memory-optimized 8.0 GB per core ratio, alongside 3780 GB of local storage. Operating under Microsoft Hyper-V, this server delivers top-tier multi-core CPU performance, exceptional large-block memory bandwidth, and superior database operation throughput. While single-core performance and vector instruction support are limited, its high memory density and local storage capacity offer qualitative cost efficiency for scale-out workloads. The E64pds_v6 is highly suited for database hosting, software compilation, static web serving, and memory-intensive enterprise applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E64pds_v6 is an ARM64 virtual machine featuring 64 physical cores, 512 GB RAM, and 3780 GB local storage, delivering top-tier multi-core performance for database and memory-intensive workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E64pds_v6 is an ARM64 virtual machine with 64 vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, and 3780 GB local storage, optimized for database and memory-heavy workloads.
tagline: An ARM64 virtual machine featuring high memory density, substantial local storage, and top-tier multi-core performance for demanding database workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by a 64-core Microsoft Neoverse-N2 ARM64 processor running at 3.4 GHz.
Equipped with 512.0 GB of RAM and 3780 GB of local NVMe storage.
Delivers top-tier multi-core CPU performance and large-block memory bandwidth.
Optimized for database operations, software compilation, and static web serving.
Lacks hyperthreading and AVX/AMX vector extensions.
